message:
Complete codegen/classes refactoring - split into 5 modules

Reduces classes.zig from 1,029 to 14 lines (99% reduction).

Created src/codegen/classes/ directory with 5 modules:
- attributes.zig (37 lines) - Attribute access (obj.attr)
- classes.zig (303 lines) - Class definition codegen
- instantiation.zig (92 lines) - Class instantiation + primitive wrappers
- methods.zig (385 lines) - Method calls (all string/list/dict methods)
- python_ffi.zig (243 lines) - Python FFI wrappers (NumPy integration)

New classes.zig is a thin re-export layer.

All modules < 400 lines (well within 500-line guideline).

Combined with parser refactoring:
- parser.zig: 1,402 → 157 lines (-89%)
- classes.zig: 1,029 → 14 lines (-99%)
- Total reduction: 2,431 → 171 lines (-93%)

Benefits:
- Clear separation of concerns
- Parallel agent work with zero conflicts
- Easy navigation and maintenance
- All tests passing
